acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

constructor.custom:security: Only the admin can create markets and manage gearing token implementations
constructor.details: Sets up the factory with a market implementation and deploys the default ERC20 gearing token

params.TERMMAX_MARKET_IMPLEMENTATION_: The address of the TermMax market implementation contract
params.admin: The address that will have administrative privileges over the factory

createMarket(bytes32,(address,address,ad.custom:access: Only the factory owner can create new markets
createMarket(bytes32,(address,address,ad.custom:events: Emits CreateMarket event with market details for indexing and monitoring
createMarket(bytes32,(address,address,ad.custom:validation: Validates that the requested gearing token implementation exists
createMarket(bytes32,(address,address,ad.details: Clones the market implementation and initializes it with the provided parameters

params.gtKey: The key identifying which gearing token implementation to use
params.params: The initial parameters for market configuration including collateral, debt token, and settings
params.salt: Additional entropy for deterministic address generation

returns.market: The address of the newly created market contract

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

predictMarketAddress(address,address,add.custom:view: This is a view function that doesn't modify state
predictMarketAddress(address,address,add.details: Uses CREATE2 deterministic deployment to calculate the future market address

params.collateral: The address of the collateral token for the market
params.debtToken: The address of the debt token for the market
params.deployer: The address that will deploy the market (msg.sender during createMarket)
params.maturity: The maturity timestamp of the market
params.salt: Additional salt value for address generation uniqueness

returns.market: The predicted address where the market will be deployed

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setGtImplement(string,address).custom:access: Only the factory owner can register new implementations
setGtImplement(string,address).custom:events: Emits SetGtImplement event for tracking implementation changes
setGtImplement(string,address).details: Allows the factory to support different types of gearing tokens for various collateral types

params.gtImplement: The contract address of the gearing token implementation
params.gtImplementName: The string name of the gearing token implementation

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

TERMMAX_MARKET_IMPLEMENTATION().notice: The implementation of TermMax Market contract used as template for cloning

constructor.notice: Constructs the TermMax Factory V2 with initial configurations

createMarket(bytes32,(address,address,ad.notice: Creates a new TermMax market with specified parameters

gtImplements(bytes32).notice: Mapping of gearing token implementation names to their contract addresses

predictMarketAddress(address,address,add.notice: Predicts the address where a market will be deployed before actual creation

setGtImplement(string,address).notice: Registers a new gearing token implementation with a given name
